findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: final review round confirms prior blocking finding f1 is still unresolved and has no worktree-visible human deferral. tests/unit/self-leak-lint.tests.ps1 exits 1 at its real-repo born-clean guard, and scripts/internal/lint-self-leak.ps1 exits 1 on the same five unannotated DEC-198-* hits (shared-governance.ps1 lines 1791, 1836, 1925, 1962; validate-governance.ps1 line 1567). This contradicts the T005 pass/green claim and leaves the newly blocking CI lane red. Stop the autonomous review/fix loop; a human must decide whether to fix/annotate the shipped identifiers or record an explicit worktree-visible deferral naming an approver and carried work.
